hero.description: From design to deploy — I ship end-to-end fullstack products, blending fluid interfaces, scalable architectures, and applied AI.

about.title: About Me
about.bio1: Senior Software Engineer with over 9 years of experience building scalable, high-performance fullstack products, end to end. My graphic design background gives me a rare edge: I see every product through both a designer's and an engineer's eyes.
about.bio2: My approach combines clean architecture, pixel-perfect implementation, and applied AI focused on user experience. I believe great products are born at the intersection of technical excellence and thoughtful design.

skills.title: Tech Stack
skills.description: Technologies and tools I work with daily

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.description: My journey building modern web applications across different companies and industries

items.title: Fullstack Developer
items.description:
Allocated at Serasa Experian, Brazil's largest credit analysis and data intelligence solutions company, with over 60 million monthly queries

* Developed and implemented new screens, features, and reusable components using React and TypeScript with Ant Design as foundation, ensuring responsive, accessible, and scalable interfaces with consistent visual standardization.

* Contributed to the NestJS-based BFF (Backend-for-Frontend) layer, implementing and integrating REST endpoints and handling data modeling in PostgreSQL within a multi-tenant architecture.

* Designed and implemented a bulk CSV file export system that processes thousands of UUIDs simultaneously, eliminating repetitive manual processes and increasing operational productivity by 60%.

* Restructured and optimized the main application rules management screen, implementing architectural improvements with Context API and React Query that resulted in 40% reduction in loading time and 35% optimization in filter performance.

* Mentored frontend developers and actively participated in technical and architectural decisions, collaborating with cross-functional teams (QA, Designers, PO, PM, and Backend) to ensure high-quality deliveries and product scalability.

* Implemented automated tests with React Testing Library and utilized GitLab CI/CD with Git Flow to ensure organized development processes, efficient code reviews, and secure automated deployments.

items.title: Frontend Developer
items.description: Developed responsive web applications using React and Angular for clients in fintech and e-commerce. Implemented design systems with Tailwind CSS, reducing development time by 30%. Collaborated with UX designers to deliver pixel-perfect interfaces.

items.title: Junior Frontend Developer
items.description: Built interactive user interfaces with React and JavaScript for early-stage startups. Integrated REST APIs, implemented responsive layouts, and contributed to improving web accessibility standards across multiple products.

projects.title: Featured Work
projects.description: A selection of projects that showcase my expertise in modern frontend development

items.title: E-Commerce Dashboard
items.description: A comprehensive analytics dashboard built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features data visualization, responsive design, and admin route management.

items.title: Task Management App
items.description: A collaborative task management platform built with React and Angular. Features drag-and-drop kanban boards, real-time updates, and team collaboration.

items.title: Dev Blog Platform
items.description: A developer blog platform with MDX support, built with Next.js. Features syntax highlighting, SEO optimization, and a custom CMS with Tailwind CSS styling.
